events.title: Jennifer Lopez turns 57
events.blurb: Global superstar Jennifer Lopez celebrates her 57th birthday, marking decades of hits, iconic performances, and a lasting impact on music, film, and fashion.

angles.name: J.Lo's Enduring Influence
angles.copy: Happy birthday to the one and only J.Lo! From the Bronx to global icon, her influence on pop culture is undeniable. What's your favourite J.Lo track?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The legendary frontman of The Rolling Stones, Sir Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday, continuing his reign as one of rock's most enduring and energetic performers.

angles.name: Rock's Ageless Icon
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young and still Jagger-ing! Happy birthday to the incomparable Mick Jagger. What's your top Stones anthem?

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on August 1, 1981, forever changing the music industry with its 24/7 music video format, famously kicking off with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star'.

angles.name: The Day Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: Remember when MTV changed everything? Forty-five years ago today, the music video era officially began with The Buggles. What was the first music video that blew your mind?

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their iconic debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, launching them to stardom and becoming one of the fastest-selling debut albums in UK history.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe's Legacy
angles.copy: Thirty-two years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed the game. Which track from this Britpop masterpiece still gets you singing along?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began 57 years ago
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal event in music history and 1960s counterculture, kicked off on August 15, 1969, attracting hundreds of thousands to a dairy farm in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Peace, Love & Music: Woodstock
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since the fields of Woodstock came alive with three days of peace, love, and music. What's your favourite performance from the legendary festival?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's passing
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the death of Elvis Presley, who passed away on August 16, 1977, leaving behind an unparalleled legacy as the 'King of Rock and Roll'.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: On this day, we remember the one and only Elvis Presley. His music continues to move generations. What's your favourite Elvis track?

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's passing
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the death of influential rapper Tupac Shakur, who passed away on September 13, 1996, leaving an indelible mark on hip-hop and popular culture.

angles.name: Tupac's Enduring Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering Tupac Shakur on the anniversary of his passing. His lyrics and impact on music are still felt today. What's your go-to Tupac track?

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's passing
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the death of guitar legend Jimi Hendrix, who passed away on September 18, 1970, forever changing the landscape of rock music.

angles.name: Remembering Jimi Hendrix
angles.copy: On this day, we remember the unparalleled genius of Jimi Hendrix. His guitar wizardry continues to inspire. What's your favourite Hendrix riff?

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' turns 57
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic 'Abbey Road' album on September 26, 1969, featuring classic tracks and one of the most famous album covers in music history.

angles.name: Abbey Road's Enduring Magic
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover, those songs... pure magic. What's your standout track?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The iconic lead singer of The Pretenders, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday, known for her distinctive voice and influential rock career.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Chrissie Hynde
angles.copy: Seventy-five years of rock 'n' roll attitude! Happy birthday to the legendary Chrissie Hynde. What's your favourite Pretenders hit?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: The outspoken and unmistakable voice of Oasis, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday, continuing his influential career in British rock music.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Star's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing that undeniable swagger to British music. What's your favourite Liam moment?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' released 55 years ago
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic single 'Imagine' was released on October 11, 1971, becoming a timeless anthem for peace and hope.

angles.name: Imagine: 55 Years On
angles.copy: Fifty-five years since John Lennon asked us to 'Imagine'. A song that still resonates globally. What does 'Imagine' mean to you?

events.title: First iPod released 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple launched the revolutionary first-generation iPod on October 23, 2001, forever changing how we listen to music and paving the way for digital music players.

angles.name: The Device That Changed Music
angles.copy: Remember your first iPod? Twenty-five years ago today, Apple unveiled a device that put '1,000 songs in your pocket' and changed music forever. What was on your first iPod playlist?

events.title: Happy James Bond Day!
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated annually as James Bond Day, marking the anniversary of the 1962 world premiere of the first James Bond film, 'Dr. No'.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Raise a martini (shaken, not stirred) to 007 and his incredible cinematic legacy. What's your favourite Bond theme tune?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Today would have been the 86th birthday of John Lennon, the legendary co-founder of The Beatles, whose music and message continue to inspire generations worldwide.

angles.name: Remembering John Lennon
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we celebrate the life and enduring legacy of John Lennon. His vision for peace lives on. What's your favourite Lennon song?

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The iconic British comedian, actor, and writer John Cleese, best known for Monty Python and Fawlty Towers, celebrates his 87th birthday.

angles.name: Comedy Legend's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 87th birthday to the brilliant John Cleese! From Monty Python to Fawlty Towers, his comedic genius is timeless. What's your favourite John Cleese moment?

events.title: The Beatles' 'White Album' turns 58
events.blurb: The Beatles released their groundbreaking double album, officially titled 'The Beatles' but known as 'The White Album', on November 22, 1968, showcasing their diverse musical directions.

angles.name: The White Album's Legacy
angles.copy: Fifty-eight years ago, The Beatles unleashed 'The White Album'. A sprawling, experimental masterpiece. What's your hidden gem from this iconic record?
